scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/protocol build && corepack pnpm -r test
scripts.dev:server: corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/protocol build && corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/server dev
scripts.dev:web: corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/protocol build && corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/web dev
scripts.dev:adapter: corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/protocol build && corepack pnpm --filter @cacp/cli-adapter dev ../../docs/examples/generic-cli-agent.local.json
scripts.check: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
